commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
#!/bin/bash

echo "$(date) - mode: $2, VM: $1" >> /home/tester/yaml/logs/renameif.log
vm=$1
mode=$2

function renameif(){

  echo "$(date) - VM name: $2" >> /home/tester/yaml/logs/renameif.log

  # Change vnet to vmnet dynamically
  if [ "$1" == "dumpxml" ]; then
    virsh dumpxml "$2" > /tmp/"$2".xml
  fi
  if [ "$2" == "ubuntu-services" ]; then
    awk '/<target dev='\''vnet[0-9]+'\''\/>/ {sub(/vnet[0-9]+/, "ubuntu-i-" i++)} { print }' /tmp/"$2".xml > /tmp/"$2".xml.new && sudo mv /tmp/"$2".xml.new /tmp/"$2".xml
  else
    awk -v suffix="$2" '/<target dev='\''vnet[0-9]+'\''\/>/ {sub(/vnet[0-9]+/, suffix "-i-" i++)} { print }' /tmp/"$2".xml > /tmp/"$2".xml.new && sudo mv /tmp/"$2".xml.new /tmp/"$2".xml
  fi

  #exit

  echo "destorying $2"
  virsh destroy $2
  sleep 30
  
  echo "define $2"
  virsh define /tmp/"$2".xml
  sleep 5

  echo "starting $2"
  virsh start $2
}

if [ $vm == "range" ]; then
  for ((i=1; i<=13;i++))
    do
      echo  "renameif" $mode "vm$i"
      renameif $mode "vm$i"
    done
else
  echo "renameif" $mode $vm
  renameif $mode $vm
fi
